notes: 6.3: PPTX 10+ slide fix + long-text auto-shrink (PPTX & optional Excel toggle). This rebuild also hardens mainland-China downloads (CUDA torch honours the China-mirror switch + real throughput probe) and adds GPU→CPU fallback for offline video/audio transcription. / 6.3：PPTX 10 页以上错乱修复 + 长译文自动缩字（PPTX 及可选 Excel 开关）。本次重打包还加固了国内下载（GPU torch 尊重国内镜像开关 + 真实测速）并为离线视频/音频转录加了 GPU→CPU 兜底。
